description: Build an internal AI assistant using GPT-4 and LangGraph to help engineers with code generation, PR review, and documentation
Automated the entire deployment pipeline reducing deployment time from 2 hours to 10 minutes using GitHub Actions and ArgoCD
Developing a shared micro-frontend framework to enable independent deployment of UI modules across all product teams
Implement an AI-powered code review bot that automatically checks PRs for security vulnerabilities, performance issues and best practices
Building a data quality monitoring framework with automated alerts for data pipeline anomalies using Great Expectations and dbt tests
Research into cloud cost optimization strategies including spot instances, reserved capacity planning, and workload right-sizing
